title: Musical Training
description: Create your own music with Suno!

scenes.speech: Welcome to the Music Dojo! Let's create a one-of-a-kind song with AI! 🎵
scenes.title: Welcome to the Music Dojo!
scenes.content: With Suno AI, you can create songs just by using words! You can make pop, rock, classical... any kind of song you want!

scenes.speech: To create a song, think about the genre, mood, and theme!
scenes.title: Imagine Your Song
scenes.content: Put your song ideas into words. What kind of mood do you want to feel? What scene do you want it to play in?
scenes.highlight:
Example:
Genre → Upbeat pop
Mood → Exciting!
Theme → Lunchtime at school

scenes.speech: Let's write a 'request sentence' for Suno in Japanese!
scenes.title: Prompt Training
scenes.content: Learn tips to communicate effectively with AI. The more you explain, the closer the song will be to your imagination!
scenes.highlight:
Example prompt:
'A fun pop song for elementary school students to listen to on a field trip.
The tempo is fast. With Japanese lyrics.'

scenes.speech: Now, let's open Suno and actually create a song!
scenes.title: Practice! Let's Create a Song
scenes.content: Open the Suno AI website and input your prompt. What kind of song will you create?
scenes.highlight:
Steps:
1. Open suno.com
2. Input prompt
3. Generate song
4. Listen to it!

scenes.speech: If you don't like it, try changing it a bit and create again!
scenes.title: Improve Your Song
scenes.content: It's okay if it's not perfect on the first try! Gradually change the words to get closer to your ideal song.
scenes.highlight:
Improvement tips:
・Change tempo from 'fast' to 'slow'
・Add genre
・Try adding instrument names

scenes.speech: Music training complete! Share your song with everyone! 🎉
scenes.title: Training Complete!
scenes.content: Your one-of-a-kind song is complete! Share the link to your song on Slack!
